final:
module RefModule(
    input wire [4:0] gpio_in,
    input wire wr_en,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [4:0] gpio_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (wr_en) begin
            gpio_out <= gpio_in;
        end
    end
endmodule
